xPosts.content: Folks who work in AI or software engineering feel like the world is changing exponential fast.
xPosts.highlights: Chollet observes that AI/software engineers perceive rapid exponential change in the world.
xPosts.worthReading: Reflects the sentiment of professionals in the field about the accelerating pace of AI.

xPosts.content: The 3rd edition of my book Deep Learning with Python is being printed right now, and will be in bookstores within 2 weeks. The problem with Facebook is not *just* the loss of your privacy and the fact that it can be used as a totalitarian panopticon.
xPosts.highlights: Chollet announces the 3rd edition of his book and criticizes Facebook beyond privacy issues.
xPosts.worthReading: Shows Chollet's ongoing work on deep learning education and his views on social media.

xPosts.content: It's surprisingly easy to do "hard" things -- for the most part, you need to get started and keep at it
xPosts.highlights: Chollet emphasizes that starting and persisting are key to accomplishing difficult tasks.
xPosts.worthReading: Provides a motivational perspective on tackling challenges in AI and life.

xPosts.content: Many people assume that LRM reasoning breaks down past a certain "complexity" or "number of steps"
xPosts.highlights: Chollet questions assumptions about limitations of large reasoning models.
xPosts.worthReading: Relevant to understanding debates on reasoning capabilities of LLMs.

xPosts.content: Many people assume that LRM reasoning breaks down past a certain 'complexity' or 'number of steps'
xPosts.highlights: Chollet comments on a common assumption about reasoning in large reasoning models (LRMs).
xPosts.worthReading: Insight into Chollet's perspective on limitations of current AI reasoning.

xPosts.content: Reaching AGI won't be beating a benchmark. It will be the end of the human-AI gap.
xPosts.highlights: Chollet argues that AGI is not about benchmark performance but closing the gap between human and AI capabilities.
xPosts.worthReading: Provides a thought-provoking definition of AGI beyond typical metrics.
